events.title: Referral received
events.detail: New referral from Zuckerberg San Francisco General for client 1101. Starting intake pipeline.

events.title: Client profile structured
events.detail: Diet orders: cardiovascular. Allergies: egg, shellfish. Sodium ceiling 700 mg/meal, carbs 35–70 g/meal. Prefers Mexican; dislikes beef, cilantro. Cooking ability: stovetop. 7 meals/week, zone Bayview-Hunters Point.

events.title: Dispatching Clinical Matching Agent
events.detail: Hard constraint hierarchy locked: allergens → sodium → carbs → diet-order tags. Exclusion rules, never scoring penalties.

events.title: Scanning inventory
events.detail: Scoring all 80 meals against hard constraints, then ranking survivors by cuisine preference and dislike avoidance.

events.title: Rejected: Veggie Enchiladas
events.detail: Excluded — diet order 'cardiovascular': meal lacks 'heart-healthy' tag.

events.title: Rejected: Chicken Pozole Verde
events.detail: Excluded — diet order 'cardiovascular': meal lacks 'heart-healthy' tag.

events.title: Matched: Calabacitas con Pollo
events.detail: All hard checks pass — sodium 374/700 mg ✓, carbs 43 g (target 35–70) ✓, no egg/shellfish ✓.

events.title: Matched: Turkey Picadillo with Rice
events.detail: All hard checks pass — sodium 440/700 mg ✓, carbs 48 g (target 35–70) ✓, no egg/shellfish ✓.

events.title: Matched: Chicken Fajita Bowl
events.detail: All hard checks pass — sodium 450/700 mg ✓, carbs 57 g (target 35–70) ✓, no egg/shellfish ✓.

events.title: Route assigned
events.detail: Client 1101 added to route R-BAYV-1 (Bayview-Hunters Point), delivery 2026-07-21, window 12:00–14:00. Cold chain OK.

events.title: Plan complete
events.detail: Client 1101: 7 compliant meal(s) at fallback level 0. 0 hard-constraint violations.
